name: heygen-skills
description: Create HeyGen avatar videos through the v3 Video Agent pipeline, handling avatar resolution, aspect-ratio correction, prompt engineering, and voice selection automatically.

interface.shortDescription: Create HeyGen avatar videos through the v3 Video Agent pipeline, handling avatar resolution, aspect-ratio correction, prompt engineering, and voice selection automatically.
interface.longDescription: Route all HeyGen usage through MCP, the heygen CLI, or the OpenClaw plugin's v3 pipeline — never raw api.heygen.com calls.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use HeyGen Skills safely.
